arts.ttl: Manchester United man is ‘crazy transfer target’ for Ole Gunnar Solskjær – ‘Personally interested’ in transfer
arts.sum: Ole Gunnar Solskjær is interested in reuniting with Marcus Rashford at Besiktas if he forward does leave Manchester United this month. That’s according to journalist Gökmen Ozcan, who reports that Solskjær is ‘personally interested’ in the 27-year-old. He reports that Solskjær’s ‘crazy transfer target’ is Rashford this month. The forward has been consistently linked with The post Manchester United man is ‘crazy transfer target’ for Ole Gunnar Solskjær – ‘Personally interested’ in transfer appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Rashford accepts he may need to stay at Manchester United for rest of season
arts.sum: Transfer and loan deals have come to nothing Rashford has not played since 12 December Marcus Rashford accepts he may have to stay at Manchester United for the rest of the season after failing to secure a move in the first three and a half weeks of the transfer window. Eleven full days of the window remain and the forward is intent on making himself available for as long as he is at the club. Rashford has not played for United since 12 December and five days later said he was “ready for a new challenge” after Ruben Amorim left him out of the squad for the 2-1 win at Manchester City. Rashford has no issue with Amorim, who has said the England international was dropped for “training reasons”, and would be happy to play for United again. Continue reading...
